entity.label: Nadab
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the sons of Shammai in the tribe of Judah (1 Chr. 2:28, 30).

nodes.label: Nadab
nodes.description: One of the sons of Shammai in the tribe of Judah (1 Chr. 2:28, 30).

nodes.label: Abishur
nodes.description: Father of the wall; i.e., “mason”, one of the two sons of Shammai of the tribe of Judah (1 Chr. 2:28, 29).

verses.text: And the sons of Onam were, Shammai, and Jada. And the sons of Shammai; Nadab, and Abishur.
And the sons of Nadab; Seled, and Appaim: but Seled died without children.
